variables.notes: No revenue/sales line is present on the provided Income Statement preview; company appears pre-revenue.
No cost of goods sold / cost of sales line is present on the provided Income Statement preview.

candidates.why: Explicit administrative overhead expense line and clearly populated; best match for SG&A.
Could contain overhead, but also may include non-SG&A items such as impairments or miscellaneous operating items.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation of Financial Lease Right-of-Use Assets in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Contains depreciation within SG&A, but depreciation should be excluded from XSGA_COMPONENTS.

variables.notes: Selected only the explicit SG&A-type row per hierarchy rule. Excluded Other operating expenses because it includes non-overhead items in some years, and excluded depreciation because D&A must not be included.

candidates.why: Direct R&D expense line on the income statement; best match for XRD.
Balance sheet capitalization/gross asset line, not period R&D expense.

variables.notes: Chose the income statement R&D expense line, not the balance sheet gross asset line.

candidates.why: Broad finance expense line; acceptable fallback if no specific interest expense is available.

candidates.row_label: Interest expenses attributable to lease liabilities
candidates.why: Specific interest expense line, but only lease-related and narrower than total interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
candidates.why: Most direct and preferred interest expense label.
Specific interest expense label for years where primary label changes.
Same concept with different capitalization for another year.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental lease-interest disclosure; narrower and less preferred than total interest expense lines.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest

variables.notes: Priority list uses the most specific interest expense labels first, with Financial Expenses as fallback when only broader finance cost is reported. Excluded lease-liability-only lines from final choice because XINT should prefer the broader reported interest expense line rather than a narrow component.

candidates.why: Equity total, but less preferred than owner/parent-attributable equity if available.
Balancing row, not an equity measure to use.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity

candidates.why: Total balance sheet amount, not equity.

final_choice.row_label: Total quity attributable to shareholders of Synact Pharma AB

variables.notes: Used a row outside the candidate list because the candidates missed the more appropriate owner-attributable equity line present in the Balance Sheet preview. This is preferred over Total Equity to avoid potential double counting with minority interest, although no separate NCI line is visible. Manual review is flagged because selection required going outside candidates and the label contains an apparent typo ('quity'). | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Balance Sheet] Total quity attributable to shareholders of Synact Pharma AB
No minority interest / non-controlling interests line is present on the provided Balance Sheet preview.
